## Problem Statement / 課題
<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? -->

## Proposed Solution / 提案する解決策
<!-- Describe the desired behavior -->

## Alternatives Considered / 検討した代替案

## Safety and Governance Impact / 安全性・ガバナンス影響
<!-- Explain impact on policy, auditability, credential checks, and containment. -->

## Scope / 変更範囲
- [ ] `chinju-core`
- [ ] `chinju-sidecar`
- [ ] `chinju-enclave`
- [ ] `chinju-vllm`
- [ ] Documentation only
